MINI MINUTES: Defendants City and County of San Francisco, 350 Bush Street LLC's Motion to Mediate in Lieu of Judicial Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered a Mediation Order to Show Cause scheduled on 8/26/2009 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212, a Jury Trial Date of 11/16/2009 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206.
